metadata.name: jupiterone
metadata.summary: A Python client for the JupiterOne API

classes.name: jupiterone.errors.JupiterOneClientError
documentation: Raised when error creating client

classes.name: jupiterone.errors.JupiterOneApiRetryError
documentation: Used to trigger retry on rate limit

classes.name: jupiterone.errors.JupiterOneApiError
documentation: Raised when API returns error response

modules.name: jupiterone.client
documentation: Python SDK for JupiterOne GraphQL API

functions.name: jupiterone.client.retry_on_429
documentation: Used to trigger retry on rate limit

classes.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.account
documentation: Your JupiterOne account ID

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.account
documentation: Your JupiterOne account ID

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.token
documentation: Your JupiterOne access token

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.token
documentation: Your JupiterOne access token

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient._execute_query
documentation: Executes query against graphql endpoint
pylint: disable=R1710

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient._cursor_query
documentation:
Performs a V1 graph query using cursor pagination
args:
    query (str): Query text
    cursor (str): A pagination cursor for the initial query
    include_deleted (bool): Include recently deleted entities in query/search

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient._execute_syncapi_request
documentation: Executes POST request to SyncAPI endpoints

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.query_v1
documentation:
Performs a V1 graph query
args:
    query (str): Query text
    skip (int):  Skip entity count
    limit (int): Limit entity count
    cursor (str): A pagination cursor for the initial query
    include_deleted (bool): Include recently deleted entities in query/search

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.create_entity
documentation:
Creates an entity in graph.  It will also update an existing entity.

args:
    entity_key (str): Unique key for the entity
    entity_type (str): Value for _type of entity
    entity_class (str): Value for _class of entity
    timestamp (int): Specify createdOn timestamp
    properties (dict): Dictionary of key/value entity properties

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.delete_entity
documentation:
Deletes an entity from the graph.  Note this is a hard delete.

args:
    entity_id (str): Entity ID for entity to delete

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.update_entity
documentation:
Update an existing entity.

args:
    entity_id (str): The _id of the entity to update
    properties (dict): Dictionary of key/value entity properties

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.create_relationship
documentation:
Create a relationship (edge) between two entities (vertices).

args:
    relationship_key (str): Unique key for the relationship
    relationship_type (str): Value for _type of relationship
    relationship_class (str): Value for _class of relationship
    from_entity_id (str): Entity ID of the source vertex
    to_entity_id (str): Entity ID of the destination vertex

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.update_relationship
documentation:
Update a relationship (edge) between two entities (vertices).

args:
    relationship_id (str): Unique _id of the relationship
    properties (dict): Dictionary of key/value relationship properties

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.delete_relationship
documentation:
Deletes a relationship between two entities.

args:
    relationship_id (str): The ID of the relationship

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.create_integration_instance
documentation:
Creates a new Custom Integration Instance.

args:
    instance_name (str): The "Account name" for integration instance
    instance_description (str): The "Description" for integration instance
    integration_definition_id (str): The "Integration definition ID" for integration instance,
    if no parameter is passed, then the Custom Integration definition ID will be used.

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.fetch_all_entity_properties
documentation: Fetch list of aggregated property keys from all entities in the graph.

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.fetch_all_entity_tags
documentation: Fetch list of aggregated property keys from all entities in the graph.

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.fetch_entity_raw_data
documentation: Fetch the contents of raw data for a given entity in a J1 Account.

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.start_sync_job
documentation:
Start a synchronization job.

args:
    instance_id (str): The "integrationInstanceId" request param for synchronization job
    sync_mode (str): The "syncMode" request body property for synchronization job. "DIFF", "CREATE_OR_UPDATE", or "PATCH"
    source (str): The "source" request body property for synchronization job. "api" or "integration-external"

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.upload_entities_batch_json
documentation:
Upload batch of entities.

args:
    instance_job_id (str): The "Job ID" for the Custom Integration job
    entities_list (list): List of Dictionaries containing entities data to upload

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.upload_relationships_batch_json
documentation:
Upload batch of relationships.

args:
    instance_job_id (str): The "Job ID" for the Custom Integration job
    relationships_list (list): List of Dictionaries containing relationships data to upload

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.upload_combined_batch_json
documentation:
Upload batch of entities and relationships together.

args:
    instance_job_id (str): The "Job ID" for the Custom Integration job.
    combined_payload (list): Dictionary containing combined entities and relationships data to upload.

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.bulk_delete_entities
documentation:
Send a request to bulk delete existing entities.

args:
    instance_job_id (str): The "Job ID" for the Custom Integration job.
    entities_list (list): List of dictionaries containing entities _id's to be deleted.

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.finalize_sync_job
documentation:
Start a synchronization job.

args:
    instance_job_id (str): The "Job ID" for the Custom Integration job

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.fetch_integration_jobs
documentation:
Fetch Integration Job details from defined integration instance.

args:
    instance_id (str): The "integrationInstanceId" of the integration to fetch jobs from.

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.fetch_integration_job_events
documentation:
Fetch events within an integration job run.

args:
    instance_id (str): The integration Instance Id of the integration to fetch job events from.
    instance_job_id (str): The integration Job ID of the integration to fetch job events from.

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.get_integration_definition_details
documentation: Fetch the Integration Definition Details for a given integration type.

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.fetch_integration_instances
documentation: Fetch all configured Instances for a given integration type.

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.get_integration_instance_details
documentation: Fetch configuration details for a single configured Integration Instance.

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.update_integration_instance_config_value
documentation: Update a single config k:v pair existing on a configured Integration Instance.

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.create_smartclass
documentation:
Creates a new Smart Class within Assets.

args:
    smartclass_name (str): The "Smart class name" for Smart Class to be created.
    smartclass_description (str): The "Description" for Smart Class to be created.

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.create_smartclass_query
documentation:
Creates a new J1QL Query within a defined Smart Class.

args:
    smartclass_id (str): The unique ID of the Smart Class the query is created within.
    query (str): The J1QL for the query being created.
    query_description (str): The description of the query being created.

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.evaluate_smartclass
documentation:
Execute an on-demand Evaluation of a defined Smartclass.

args:
    smartclass_id (str): The unique ID of the Smart Class to trigger the evaluation for.

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.get_smartclass_details
documentation:
Fetch config details from defined Smart Class.

args:
    smartclass_id (str): The unique ID of the Smart Class to fetch details from.

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.generate_j1ql
documentation:
Generate J1QL query syntax from natural language user input.

args:
    natural_language_prompt (str): The naturalLanguageQuery prompt input to generate J1QL from.

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.list_alert_rules
documentation: List all defined Alert Rules configured in J1 account

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.get_alert_rule_details
documentation: Get details of a single defined Alert Rule configured in J1 account

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.create_alert_rule
documentation: Create Alert Rule Configuration in J1 account

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.delete_alert_rule
documentation: Delete a single Alert Rule configured in J1 account

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.update_alert_rule
documentation: Update Alert Rule Configuration in J1 account

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.evaluate_alert_rule
documentation: Run an Evaluation for a defined Alert Rule configured in J1 account

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.list_alert_rule_evaluation_results
documentation: Fetch a list of Evaluation Results for an Alert Rule configured in J1 account

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.fetch_evaluation_result_download_url
documentation: Fetch evaluation result Download URL for Alert Rule configured in J1 account

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.fetch_downloaded_evaluation_results
documentation: Return full Alert Rule J1QL results from Download URL

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.list_questions
documentation: List all defined Questions configured in J1 account Questions Library

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.get_compliance_framework_item_details
documentation: Fetch Details of a Compliance Framework Requirement configured in J1 account

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.get_parameter_details
documentation: Fetch Details of a configured Parameter in J1 account

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.list_account_parameters
documentation: Fetch List of all configured Account Parameters in J1 account

methods.name: jupiterone.client.JupiterOneClient.create_update_parameter
documentation: Create or Update Account Parameter in J1 account
Python client class for the JupiterOne GraphQL API
